reviews.comment:
Sino sos socio de ACA solo carga combustible,  agradable el Sr q me atendió

(Translated by Google)
If you're not an ACA member, you can just fill up your tank; the gentleman who helped me was very nice.

reviews.comment:
Buena parada para comer acotadas minutas . Muy concurrida pero con poco personal. Muy bien dispuesto pero no da abasto para atender las mesas el mostrador y la cocina....

(Translated by Google)
Good stop for a quick bite. Very busy but understaffed. Very helpful staff, but they can't keep up with the tables, the counter, and the kitchen.

reviews.comment:
Tiene un camping al costado de la estación muy piola con asadores y servicios para motorhome.

(Translated by Google)
It has a really cool campsite next to the station with grills and services for motorhomes.
